title: Smoked Beef Loukoumades with Spicy Mellow Sauce
description: A twist on traditional loukoumades, these Thai-inspired treats are filled with smoked beef and served with a side of spicy mellow sauce.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
Once hot, add the loukoumades and fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes.
Remove the loukoumades from the oil and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
In a bowl, mix together the Greek yogurt, mellow cheese, smoked beef, and kidney beans.
Season with salt, black pepper, and paprika to taste.
Serve the smoked beef mixture in the center of each loukoumades.
Drizzle with additional mellow cheese sauce, if desired.
